# Volcarona Tailwind HO — Reg M-B

Built with the Champions Team Builder. **Team Health: 82 (A).** Two Mega stones
(Raichunite Y, Metagrossite) — remember you may only **Mega-evolve one per battle**;
pick based on matchup (Raichu-Y vs bulk, Metagross vs Rock/Flying).

## Game plan
A Tailwind hyper-offense around a Quiver Dance Volcarona. **Maushold** redirects with
Follow Me (+ Friend Guard chip reduction) so Volcarona gets a free Quiver Dance;
**Whimsicott** sets Tailwind and disrupts (Encore); **Raichu (Mega Y)** brings Fake Out
tempo + No-Guard Zap Cannon as a second win condition.

## Why the last two slots
- **Metagross** — Steel/Psychic **resists Rock and Flying**, patching the team's two
  worst holes (4× Rock on Volcarona; opposing Mega Staraptor). Bullet Punch is the
  team's priority; Iron Head / Psychic Fangs punish Floette, Froslass and Tyranitar.
- **Tauros-Paldea-Aqua** — Intimidate + Aqua Jet priority, and Fighting/Water **resists
  Rock and Fire** (so it answers Mega Charizard-Y sun and the Rock spam *without*
  stacking another Rock weakness the way Incineroar would). Water STAB punishes the
  Rock/Ground attackers hurting the team.

> Alternative slot 6: **Aegislash** (Wide Guard hard-blocks Rock Slide / Heat Wave and
> it's immune to Mega Staraptor's Close Combat) if you face heavy spread/Rock teams.

## Pokepaste
```
Volcarona @ Charti Berry
Ability: Flame Body
Level: 50
Timid Nature
Stat Points: 6 HP / 32 SpA / 28 Spe
- Quiver Dance
- Heat Wave
- Bug Buzz
- Protect

Whimsicott @ Focus Sash
Ability: Prankster
Level: 50
Timid Nature
Stat Points: 2 HP / 32 SpA / 32 Spe
- Tailwind
- Moonblast
- Encore
- Protect

Maushold @ Chople Berry
Ability: Friend Guard
Level: 50
Jolly Nature
Stat Points: 2 HP / 32 Atk / 32 Spe
- Follow Me
- Protect
- Super Fang
- Population Bomb

Raichu @ Raichunite Y
Ability: Lightning Rod
Level: 50
Timid Nature
Stat Points: 2 HP / 32 SpA / 32 Spe
- Fake Out
- Protect
- Zap Cannon
- Focus Blast

Metagross @ Metagrossite
Ability: Clear Body
Level: 50
Adamant Nature
Stat Points: 2 HP / 32 Atk / 32 Spe
- Protect
- Psychic Fangs
- Iron Head
- Bullet Punch

Tauros-Paldea-Aqua @ Sitrus Berry
Ability: Intimidate
Level: 50
Adamant Nature
Stat Points: 32 HP / 10 Atk / 10 SpD / 14 Spe
- Protect
- Aqua Jet
- Close Combat
- Wave Crash
```

## Open in the builder
Append this to the app URL as `#t=...` to load the exact team:

```
#
```
